hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push' && echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'V3\.1'; then cd /home/user/Gestao-Contrato && BACK=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) && git checkout claude/fix-boleto-generation-error-tuqwA && git merge V3.1 --no-ff -m 'Sync: merge V3.1 into claude/fix-boleto-generation-error-tuqwA' && git push -u origin claude/fix-boleto-generation-error-tuqwA && git checkout "$BACK"; fi 2>/dev/null || true
